description.zh: 在末日废墟中寻找曙光营地。数值驱动的生存抉择。
description.en: Find the Dawn Camp in the post-apocalyptic wasteland. Every choice costs something.

desc.en: Heavy, but hits like a truck
Light and sharp, perfect for ambushes
Can save your life when it matters most
Keep your distance and stay safe
A small flame in the endless dark

text.zh: 我从碎石堆里醒过来，全身疼得要死，天是灰红色的，远处有不像人的叫声。
text.en: I wake up in a pile of rubble. Every inch of my body screams with pain. The sky is a dull grey-red, and somewhere in the distance, something is howling — and it doesn't sound human.

text.zh: 口袋里有张皱巴巴的纸条——「往北走，曙光营地，最后的安全区」。
text.en: There's a crumpled note in my pocket: "Head north. Dawn Camp. The last safe zone."

text.zh: 我在废墟里翻了一阵，找到两样东西。
text.en: I dig through the rubble and come up with two things.

text.zh: 一根铁管和一把匕首，只能带一样，多了跑不动。
text.en: An iron pipe and a dagger. I can only carry one — too much weight and I won't be able to run.

text.zh: 铁管挺沉，但抡起来什么脑袋都得开瓢。
text.en: The pipe is heavy, but swing it hard enough and anything's skull will crack.

text.zh: 匕首插腰上几乎没重量，灵活才是活下去的关键。
text.en: The dagger barely weighs anything at my hip. In this world, staying agile is what keeps you alive.

text.zh: 路两边的楼全塌了一半，到处是干掉的血迹，但没尸体——那些东西什么都吃。
text.en: The buildings on both sides of the road are half-collapsed. Dried blood stains the ground everywhere, but no bodies — whatever's out there eats everything.

text.zh: 走了俩小时，药店废墟里传出声音：「救命……有人吗……」
text.en: Two hours in, a voice drifts out from the ruins of a pharmacy: "Help… is anyone there…"

text.zh: 有人在求救，但末日之后什么陷阱都有。
text.en: Someone's calling for help. But after the end of the world, any sound could be a trap.

text.zh: 救出个大叔他给了个打火机，心里挺踏实的，就是搬碎石出了一身汗水壶快见底了。
text.en: I pull an old man out of the rubble and he hands me a lighter in thanks. Feels good. But all that work soaked through my shirt and nearly emptied my water bottle.

text.zh: 我加快脚步走了没浪费一滴水，但那声音越来越弱，心里堵得慌。
text.en: I pick up my pace and keep walking. Didn't waste a drop of water. But the voice kept getting weaker, and I can't shake the weight of it in my chest.

text.zh: 拐进巷子，我第一次近距离看到那种东西——一个灰白色的人形怪物蹲在车上啃死猫。
text.en: I turn down an alley and see one up close for the first time — a grey-white humanoid creature crouched on a car, gnawing on a dead cat.

text.zh: 它闻到我了，猛转过头，比正常人高一头，指甲跟刀片似的。
text.en: It smells me. Its head snaps around — a full head taller than any person, with fingernails like blades.

text.zh: 它朝我扑过来了。
text.en: It lunges at me.

text.zh: 干掉了它但胳膊被抓了道口子，不过第一次杀怪信心爆棚。
text.en: I take it down, but it rakes a gash across my arm. Still — killing my first one of these things feels like something.

text.zh: 跑了三条街甩掉了人倒是没事，但跑得跟狗一样太窝囊了。
text.en: I sprint three blocks before I lose it. No damage, but running like that — it's humiliating.

text.zh: 我靠在一个门面房里歇气，手还在抖，这世界真他妈的疯了。
text.en: I slump against the wall of a shopfront to catch my breath. My hands won't stop shaking. This world has lost its mind.

text.zh: 门口突然进来个穿脏白大褂的女孩——「别紧张！我叫苏晴，是护士。」
text.en: A girl in a dirty white lab coat appears in the doorway. "Easy! I'm Su Qing. I'm a nurse."

text.zh: 她也要去曙光营地，说有个伴比单打独斗好，我没理由拒绝，就一起走了。
text.en: She's heading to Dawn Camp too. Says two people are better than one out here. Hard to argue with that, so we set off together.

text.zh: 苏晴说她会包扎，让我把伤口给她看看，不过得用掉一些绷带。
text.en: Su Qing offers to dress my wound. She says she can handle it — but it'll use up some of our bandages.

text.zh: 她手法很利索帮我包扎好了伤口不疼了，就是消毒水和绷带用掉不少。
text.en: She works fast and clean — the pain fades almost immediately. But the antiseptic and bandages take a real dent out of our supplies.

label.en: Save the supplies and keep moving

text.zh: 我说不急留着以后用，结果伤口越来越疼到晚上开始发炎了。
text.en: I tell her it can wait. By nightfall, the wound is throbbing and starting to swell — infected.

text.zh: 有个伴果然不一样，路上有人说话不那么闷了，苏晴笑起来有个小酒窝。
text.en: Having company really does make a difference. The road feels shorter when there's someone to talk to. Su Qing has a dimple when she laughs.

text.zh: 路边有个被砸烂大门的超市，里面黑漆漆的，不知道有没有东西，也不知道有没有危险。
text.en: A supermarket along the road — its front gate smashed in, the interior pitch black. Could be supplies in there. Could be worse.

text.zh: 进去搜还是算了？
text.en: Search it, or keep moving?

text.zh: 翻了一遍找到不少吃的和绷带收获很大，但搜了太久累得腿都不是自己的了。
text.en: A solid haul — food, bandages, the works. But by the time we're done, my legs feel like they belong to someone else.

label.en: Grab a few things near the entrance and go

text.zh: 在门口顺了几样就走了，没怎么费劲但也没搜到多少好东西。
text.en: We snag a few things from just inside the door and move on. Didn't cost us much energy, but we didn't find much either.

text.zh: 穿过居民区，到处是空窗户，苏晴说：「这地方拍恐怖片都不用布景。」
text.en: We pass through a residential block, every window a dark hollow. Su Qing says, "You wouldn't even need to dress a set if you wanted to film a horror movie here."

text.zh: 她说毕业才一年就末日了，「第一个月房租都没交呢世界就完了。」
text.en: She tells me she'd only been out of school a year when the world ended. "I hadn't even paid my first month's rent yet."

text.zh: 前面传来连续枪声，不是单发是连射，有人在打仗而且装备很好。
text.en: Gunfire ahead — not single shots, but sustained bursts. Whoever's out there is armed and in a serious fight.

text.zh: 枪声从东边传来，越来越近了，得赶紧决定怎么办。
text.en: The shots are coming from the east and getting closer. We need to decide fast.

text.zh: 一个短发女人单挑三只变异犬，我冲上去帮忙被刮了一下，不过打赢了心里痛快。
text.en: A short-haired woman fighting three mutant dogs alone. I rush in to help and take a scratch for it — but we win, and it feels good.

text.zh: 躲在车后面看那女人浴血奋战自己缩着不动，人没事但心里特别不是滋味。
text.en: We hide behind a wrecked car and watch the woman fight bloody and alone. We make it out fine, but I feel sick about it.

text.zh: 那个女人叫林夕，前特警，短发，左脸有道疤，眼神冷得像刀子，手里拿着十字弩。
text.en: The woman's name is Lin Xi. Former special police. Short hair. A scar on her left cheek. Eyes cold as a blade. She's carrying a crossbow.

text.zh: 她也要去曙光营地，一个人走了三天弹药快没了，自然而然就一起走了。
text.en: She's heading to Dawn Camp too — been on the road alone for three days, nearly out of bolts. It makes sense to travel together.

text.zh: 林夕三天没怎么吃东西了，脸色很差，但她不好意思开口。
text.en: Lin Xi hasn't eaten properly in three days. Her color is bad, but she won't ask.

label.en: Offer her food without being asked

text.zh: 我把吃的分了一份给她，她接过去的时候手在抖，吃完脸色好多了大家都轻松不少。
text.en: I hold out a portion without a word. Her hands are trembling when she takes it. After she eats, the tension in the group eases.

text.zh: 我没说什么继续赶路，林夕硬撑着走但眼神更冷了，气氛尴尬得要命。
text.en: I say nothing and keep walking. Lin Xi pushes on, but her eyes go even colder. The silence between us is suffocating.

text.zh: 三个人走快多了，林夕在前面探路，偶尔回头看看苏晴，眼神没那么冷了。
text.en: Three people move much faster. Lin Xi scouts ahead, glancing back at Su Qing now and then. Her eyes have softened slightly.

text.zh: 傍晚到了个加油站，便利店货架上还剩点东西，但背包只装得下一类。
text.en: By evening we reach a gas station. The convenience store shelves still have some things on them, but we can only fit one type of supply in the pack.

text.zh: 药品还是食物，只能选一样。
text.en: Medicine or food — pick one.

text.zh: 消毒水绷带止痛药，苏晴说有这些她就能处理大部分伤口。
text.en: Antiseptic, bandages, painkillers. Su Qing says with this she can handle most wounds we're likely to encounter.

text.zh: 压缩饼干和能量棒，味道一言难尽但至少有得吃了。
text.en: Compressed crackers and energy bars. The taste is genuinely indescribable — but at least there's something to eat.

text.zh: 第二天走了没俩小时，前后路口突然全被车堵死了，林夕瞬间拉起弩。
text.en: Less than two hours into the second day, both ends of the road are suddenly blocked by vehicles. Lin Xi has her crossbow up before I can blink.

text.zh: 冒出七八个拿棍棒砍刀的，领头的独眼满脸横肉，叼着烟——他们叫他蝎子。
text.en: Seven or eight men emerge with clubs and machetes. The one in front has one eye, a face built like a fist, and a cigarette dangling from his mouth. They call him Scorpion.

text.zh: 蝎子后面走出个光头纹蜈蚣的，转着刀慢悠悠的：「我叫赵铁，过路费——交出所有东西。」
text.en: Behind Scorpion steps a bald man with a centipede tattooed across his skull, casually spinning a knife. "Name's Zhao Tie. Toll road. Hand over everything."

text.zh: 赵铁看着苏晴和林夕：「两个漂亮姑娘，要不留下来？」蝎子在旁边猥琐地笑。
text.en: Zhao Tie eyes Su Qing and Lin Xi. "Two pretty girls — why not stay awhile?" Scorpion grins beside him.

text.zh: 他们七八个人，我们三个，硬拼吃亏但就这么认怂也咽不下去。
text.en: Seven or eight against three. Fighting straight up is a losing bet — but I can't just swallow this.

text.zh: 我一拳打蝎子脸上，但人太多被按地上揍了一顿，不过这口气出了值。
text.en: I plant a fist in Scorpion's face. They dog-pile me and I take a serious beating — but it was worth it.

text.zh: 我把东西倒地上，蝎子当面嚼我的吃的还撞了苏晴一下，窝囊到想死。
text.en: I dump everything on the ground. Scorpion chews my food right in front of me and deliberately shoves Su Qing as he walks past. I've never felt more pathetic.

text.zh: 赵铁走了，苏晴蹲在我旁边擦伤口，嘴唇抿得紧紧的，林夕盯着他们离开的方向。
text.en: Zhao Tie leaves. Su Qing crouches beside me and cleans my wounds in silence, lips pressed thin. Lin Xi stares in the direction they disappeared.

text.zh: 总有一天我会让那个秃头好看。苏晴按了按我肩膀：「先活着，有命在什么都有机会。」
text.en: Someday I'll make that bald bastard pay. Su Qing squeezes my shoulder. "Stay alive first. As long as you're breathing, there's still a chance."

text.zh: 经过一个便利店，收银台后面突然弹出个脑袋：「啊！」一个扎俩揪揪的女孩抱着一袋薯片。
text.en: We pass a convenience store. A head pops up from behind the counter: "Aah!" A girl with two little pigtails, clutching a bag of chips.

text.zh: 她叫小萌，高三生，在这躲了好几天了，居然还在笑：「太好了有活人！我快闷死了！」
text.en: Her name is Xiaomeng. A senior in high school. She's been hiding here for days — and somehow she's still smiling. "Oh thank god, real people! I was going crazy in here!"

text.zh: 小萌跟着我们走了，她手里那袋薯片哗哗响，大家都饿得不行。
text.en: Xiaomeng falls in with us. That bag of chips crinkles with every step, and everyone's starving.

text.zh: 薯片分了每人一把，久违的零食味让大家都笑了，就是吃完啥也不剩了。
text.en: A handful each. The taste of junk food hits like a memory from another life. Everyone laughs. But the bag is empty when we're done.

label.zh: 让她把薯片收好省着吃
label.en: Tell her to save them for later

text.zh: 我说留着路上慢慢吃，小萌乖乖收起来不吱声了，气氛沉闷了不少。
text.en: I tell her to ration them. Xiaomeng nods and tucks the bag away without a word. The mood drops.

text.zh: 远处天际线有几道黑烟，小萌说那方向以前是她学校，然后她安静了好一会儿。
text.en: Black smoke rises along the distant skyline. Xiaomeng says her school used to be in that direction. Then she goes quiet for a long time.

text.zh: 穿过公园的时候草丛里窜出六七只变异犬，没毛，灰色皮，牙齿跟刀子一样，把我们围了。
text.en: Crossing the park, six or seven mutant dogs burst from the undergrowth. Hairless. Grey-skinned. Teeth like blades. They circle us.

text.zh: 变异犬堵路了，太多了不好打，但我包里还有食物。
text.en: The dogs are blocking our path. There are too many to fight clean — but I still have food in my pack.

text.zh: 林夕弩射倒两只，我被一只咬了小腿，苏晴砸石头才救下我，打完赢了但腿在流血。
text.en: Lin Xi pins two with her crossbow. One gets its teeth into my calf — Su Qing knocks it off with a rock. We win, but my leg is bleeding.

label.en: Throw food to lure them away

text.zh: 把吃的全扔出去它们一窝蜂扑过去，趁机跑了人倒是没事但物资全没了。
text.en: I hurl all the food in the opposite direction. They swarm it instantly. We run. Nobody hurt — but our supplies are gone.

text.zh: 天快黑了，那些东西晚上更活跃，必须找地方躲。
text.en: The light is fading. Those things are more active after dark. We need shelter.

text.zh: 前面一个地下车库又黑又闷但隐蔽，旁边居民楼天台开阔但暴露。
text.en: Ahead: an underground parking garage — dark and stuffy, but hidden. Next to it, a residential building with a rooftop — open, but exposed.

text.zh: 在哪过夜？
text.en: Where do we sleep?

text.zh: 用车堵了入口睡了个安稳觉体力恢复不少，但黑得跟棺材似的发霉味太上头了。
text.en: We block the entrance with a car and actually get some real sleep. Bodies recover well — but the pitch darkness and mildew smell are hard to shake.

text.zh: 满天星星苏晴靠在我旁边聊天心情特别好，但风太大冻得一夜没怎么合眼。
text.en: A sky full of stars. Su Qing leans against me and we talk for hours. My mood lifts more than it has in days. But the wind is brutal — I barely sleep.

text.zh: 半夜苏晴来换班，突然说：「末日之前我连跟喜欢的人表白都不敢，现在想想真傻。」
text.en: In the middle of the night, Su Qing comes to take her watch. Out of nowhere she says, "Before all this, I was too scared to tell someone I liked them. Feels pretty stupid now."

text.zh: 她转头看我：「到了营地我请你吃罐头吧，现在只有这个了。」月光下她笑了。
text.en: She turns to look at me. "When we get to the camp, I'll treat you to canned food. It's all there is." She smiles in the moonlight.

text.zh: 第二天上路没多远，林夕突然抬手——她听到引擎声了。
text.en: Not far into the next morning, Lin Xi raises her fist. She's heard engines.

text.zh: 一辆改装皮卡冲出来，蝎子站在车上端着霰弹枪：「赵哥说了，上次的账没算完。」
text.en: A modified pickup truck roars out. Scorpion is standing in the bed, pointing a shotgun at us. "Boss says the last tab isn't settled yet."

text.zh: 这次蝎子有枪了，身后是死路，退无可退。
text.en: Scorpion has a gun this time. There's a wall at our backs. No retreating.

text.zh: 林夕射中蝎子手臂枪脱手，我拼命放倒两个累到脱力，但靠着一股狠劲没让自己倒下。
text.en: Lin Xi puts a bolt through Scorpion's arm — the shotgun clatters away. I take down two more through sheer fury, barely standing when it's over.

text.zh: 「分头跑！」没怎么费力气但跑的时候被铁丝网刮了一道大口子，血流了一路。
text.en: "Split up, run!" It doesn't take much out of me — but a barbed wire fence opens a long gash on my side. I bleed all the way to where we regroup.

text.zh: 我跟林夕小萌汇合了，但苏晴不在，我喊她名字没人应。
text.en: I find Lin Xi and Xiaomeng. Su Qing isn't with them. I call her name. Silence.

text.zh: 远处传来她的尖叫，蝎子把她按在皮卡车斗里一脚踩着她的背。
text.en: A scream from the distance. Scorpion has Su Qing pinned to the truck bed, his boot on her back.

text.zh: 赵铁摇下车窗竖了个中指：「小护士我先借走了，想要的话来东边钢铁厂找我。」车开走了。
text.en: Zhao Tie rolls down the window and raises a middle finger. "I'm borrowing your little nurse. If you want her back, come find me at the steel mill, east side." The truck drives away.

text.zh: 林夕射了一箭扎进轮胎但车没停，我跪在地上拳头砸柏油路面，小萌哭了。
text.en: Lin Xi fires a bolt into one of the tires. The truck doesn't stop. I'm on my knees, pounding the asphalt with my fists. Xiaomeng is crying.

text.zh: 林夕说：「我知道那个厂在哪，但我们现在去等于送死。」
text.en: Lin Xi says, "I know where that factory is. But going right now is suicide."

label.en: I don't care — we go now

text.zh: 我满脑子都是苏晴的脸顾不上别的了，什么都没带就往东跑。
text.en: All I can see is Su Qing's face. I don't grab anything — I just start running east.

text.zh: 忍住冲动先搜了一圈找到些东西，但想到苏晴还在那受苦我心如刀绞。
text.en: I force myself to hold back and search the area first. We find a few things — but every second I'm thinking about what Su Qing is going through is like a knife in my gut.

text.zh: 钢铁厂在东边五公里，以前是冶炼厂，赵铁改成了老巢，守卫都有武器。
text.en: The steel mill is five kilometers east. It used to be a smelting plant. Zhao Tie has turned it into his base, with armed guards throughout.

text.zh: 路上林夕在翻倒的工程车里找到两样东西摆在我面前。
text.en: On the way, Lin Xi digs through an overturned construction vehicle and lays two things in front of me.

text.zh: 一把钢管焊的铁锤，和一张用弹簧钢丝做的弓配五支铁箭。
text.en: A hammer welded from steel pipe, and a bow fashioned from spring wire strung with five iron-tipped arrows.

text.zh: 要去打架了，选个靠得住的家伙。
text.en: We're heading into a fight. Pick something reliable.

text.zh: 死沉，但一下能砸碎脑袋，正面突破就靠它了。
text.en: Dead heavy, but one swing can cave a skull. If we're going through the front, this is what I need.

text.zh: 拉了拉弹性不错，五支箭不多但能远程解决问题。
text.en: I test the draw — solid tension. Five arrows isn't much, but being able to hit from range could make the difference.

text.zh: 钢铁厂到了，但大门前蹲着一只我没见过的东西——两米多高四条腿，身上长着甲壳。
text.en: The steel mill is in sight. But crouched at the main gate is something I've never seen before — over two meters tall, four-legged, armored with a chitinous shell.

text.zh: 它喘着粗气带着腐烂恶臭，要进厂必须过它这关，不过它好像视力不太好靠闻的。
text.en: It breathes in wet, ragged heaves, trailing a stench of rot. To get inside, we have to get past it. But it seems to navigate by smell rather than sight.

text.zh: 甲壳很硬正面不一定打得穿，但它转身慢。
text.en: The shell is tough — a frontal attack might not penetrate. But it turns slowly.

text.zh: 被它甩了一下差点断骨头，但找到缝隙捅进去了，好在没怎么跑没费多少力气。
text.en: It flings me and I nearly break something — but I find a gap in the plating and drive my weapon through. Didn't have to run much, so I'm not too drained.

label.en: Lure it away and slip past

text.zh: 小萌扔石头我们从侧面疯跑绕过去了人没事，就是跑得上气不接下气快虚脱了。
text.en: Xiaomeng throws rocks to draw its attention while we sprint around the side. Nobody hurt — but I'm running on empty.

text.zh: 绕到侧面围墙有几个洞，里面传来笑声——赵铁的人在喝酒，大概五六个。
text.en: Around the side, the perimeter wall has gaps. Through them: laughter. Zhao Tie's men drinking — five or six of them.

text.zh: 小萌指着一个生锈侧门：「那好像没人。」正门倒是只有两个哨兵看着不太精神。
text.en: Xiaomeng points at a rusted side door. "Looks unguarded." The main gate has two sentries — but they look half-asleep.

text.zh: 正门人少但会被看见，侧门隐蔽但不知里面啥情况。
text.en: The front has fewer guards but no cover. The side door is stealthy — but we don't know what's behind it.

text.zh: 林夕放倒门卫我顺手搜了他们身上翻到点东西，但打进去费了不少劲。
text.en: Lin Xi drops the guards. I pat them down and find a few useful things. But forcing the gate takes a real toll on us.

label.en: Sneak in through the side door

text.zh: 从侧门悄悄溜进去没怎么费劲，但绕了一大圈路上喝完了最后的水。
text.en: We slip through without being seen and barely break a sweat — but the long route around drains the last of our water.

text.zh: 在工厂深处的铁皮房里找到苏晴了，绑在椅子上贴着胶带，脸上有被打的痕迹。
text.en: We find Su Qing deep inside the factory, in a corrugated iron room — bound to a chair with tape, bruises on her face.

text.zh: 我解开绳子撕掉胶带，苏晴扑过来哭着说：「你真的来了……」
text.en: I cut the ropes and tear off the tape. Su Qing collapses into me, crying. "You actually came…"

text.zh: 门口传来鼓掌声，蝎子靠在门框上笑：「好感人啊，可惜故事到这该结束了。」
text.en: Slow clapping from the doorway. Scorpion leans against the frame, grinning. "Real touching. Too bad the story ends here."

text.zh: 蝎子堵住出口举起刀：「让我看看你有多想带走这小妞。」
text.en: Scorpion blocks the exit and raises his knife. "Show me how badly you want to take her out of here."

text.zh: 身上多了几道口子，但想到苏晴的伤我爆发了一下把蝎子打飞吐血倒地。
text.en: He opens me up in a few places. Then I think of Su Qing's bruises — and something snaps. I send Scorpion flying, spitting blood.

text.zh: 林夕射箭扎他大腿我踹翻他没怎么受伤，但这狗东西没打死我心里不痛快。
text.en: Lin Xi puts an arrow in his thigh and I kick him over. Barely a scratch on me — but the fact that he's still breathing sits wrong.

text.zh: 跑出铁皮房，喇叭里传来赵铁的声音：「今天算你们走运，我迟早会找到你。」
text.en: We burst out of the iron room. Zhao Tie's voice crackles over a loudspeaker: "You got lucky today. I'll find you eventually."

text.zh: 冲出工厂，苏晴虚弱但还在笑，小萌抱着她不撒手，林夕回头又朝工厂射了一箭。
text.en: We clear the factory gates. Su Qing is weak but still smiling. Xiaomeng won't let go of her. Lin Xi turns and fires one more bolt back at the building.

text.zh:
然后我看到了——北方地平线亮起一簇电灯光，不是火光，是文明的光。曙光营地，到了。

—— 第一章 · 完 ——
text.en:
And then I see it.

On the northern horizon, a cluster of electric lights. Not fire. Not flames. The light of civilization.

Dawn Camp. We made it.

—— Chapter 1 · End ——
